tools.name: createReplicationSet.postOperation
tools.description: A replication set replicates and encrypts your data to the provided Regions with the provided KMS key.

tools.name: createResponsePlan.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a response plan that automates the initial response to incidents. A response plan engages contacts, starts chat channel collaboration, and initiates runbooks at the beginning of an incident.

tools.name: createTimelineEvent.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a custom timeline event on the incident details page of an incident record. Incident Manager automatically creates timeline events that mark key moments during an incident. You can create custom timeline events to mark important events that Incident Manager can detect automatically.

tools.name: deleteIncidentRecord.postOperation
tools.description: Delete an incident record from Incident Manager.

tools.name: deleteReplicationSetArn.deleteReplicationSet
tools.description: Deletes all Regions in your replication set. Deleting the replication set deletes all Incident Manager data.

tools.name: deleteResourcePolicy.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes the resource policy that Resource Access Manager uses to share your Incident Manager resource.

tools.name: deleteResponsePlan.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes the specified response plan. Deleting a response plan stops all linked CloudWatch alarms and EventBridge events from creating an incident with this response plan.

tools.name: deleteTimelineEvent.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a timeline event from an incident.

tools.name: getIncidentRecordArn.getIncidentRecord
tools.description: Returns the details for the specified incident record.

tools.name: getReplicationSetArn.getReplicationSet
tools.description: Retrieve your Incident Manager replication set.

tools.name: getResourcePoliciesResourceArn.getResourcePolicies
tools.description: Retrieves the resource policies attached to the specified response plan.

tools.name: getResponsePlanArn.getResponsePlan
tools.description: Retrieves the details of the specified response plan.

tools.name: getTimelineEventEventIdIncidentRecordArn.getTimelineEvent
tools.description: Retrieves a timeline event based on its ID and incident record.

tools.name: listIncidentRecords.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all incident records in your account. Use this command to retrieve the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the incident record you want to update.

tools.name: listRelatedItems.postOperation
tools.description: List all related items for an incident record.

tools.name: listReplicationSets.postOperation
tools.description: Lists details about the replication set configured in your account.

tools.name: listResponsePlans.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all response plans in your account.

tools.name: listTimelineEvents.postOperation
tools.description: Lists timeline events for the specified incident record.

tools.name: putResourcePolicy.postOperation
tools.description: Adds a resource policy to the specified response plan. The resource policy is used to share the response plan using Resource Access Manager (RAM). For more information about cross-account sharing, see Cross-Region and cross-account incident management.

tools.name: startIncident.postOperation
tools.description: Used to start an incident from CloudWatch alarms, EventBridge events, or manually.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags that are attached to the specified response plan.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds a tag to a response plan.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes a tag from a resource.

tools.name: updateDeletionProtection.postOperation
tools.description: Update deletion protection to either allow or deny deletion of the final Region in a replication set.

tools.name: updateIncidentRecord.postOperation
tools.description: Update the details of an incident record. You can use this operation to update an incident record from the defined chat channel. For more information about using actions in chat channels, see Interacting through chat.

tools.name: updateRelatedItems.postOperation
tools.description: Add or remove related items from the related items tab of an incident record.

tools.name: updateReplicationSet.postOperation
tools.description: Add or delete Regions from your replication set.

tools.name: updateResponsePlan.postOperation
tools.description: Updates the specified response plan.

tools.name: updateTimelineEvent.postOperation
tools.description: Updates a timeline event. You can update events of type Custom Event.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
